
EXAMPLES FOR CHAPTER 9 - "Images".

The examples for this chapter require 27 KB.
			
Files contained in this folder:				
	Manifest
	dict1.ps (*)  (1)
	dict2.ps (*) 
	dict3.ps (*) (1)
	filters1.ps (*)
	filters2.ps (*)
	imgmask1.ps
	imgmask2.ps
	imgmask3.ps
	imgmask4.ps
	imgmask5.ps
	shuimg1.ps
	shuimg2.ps
	sigma.ps

(*)	Requires PostScript Level 2.

(1)	The line reading
		/DataSource { currentfile temp readhexstring pop }
	in the book, should read
		/DataSource { currentfile temp readhexstring pop } def
	Both examples on this disk have been fixed.
